name: mcp-server-playwright
description: Browser automation for LLMs using structured accessibility snapshots.

rating.reason: Good overall documentation quality with clear, purposeful tool names and adequate descriptions that cover core functionality. Parameter descriptions are generally clear and include helpful constraints/examples. Some tools like browser_evaluate and browser_run_code could benefit from more context about usage scenarios, and a few descriptions are quite brief, but the toolset provides sufficient guidance for effective usage without major gaps.
